e1_sentence: It has been narrated, on the authority of Anas that on the Day of Hunain Umm  Sulaim took out a dagger she had in her possession
e2_sentence: The Messenger of  Allah (may peace be upon him) said: "Umm Sulaim, God is sufficient (against  the mischief of the polytheists) and He will be kind to us (so you need not  carry this dagger).

e1_sentence: The  Messenger of Allah (may peace be upon him) asked (her): "What are you holding  this dagger for?
e2_sentence: She said: "I took it up so that I may tear open the belly of  a polytheist who comes near me.
